title: SecForce Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''SecForce Squadron''' was a force of [[Toscan 8-Q starfighter]]s that protected [[Azzameen family]] vessels from the [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]] company that they owned. Some time before the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] discovered the existence of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]], the Alliance assigned the Azzameen family to gather supplies for the [[Vergesso Base|Vergesso Shipyard]] in the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]]. [[Aeron Azzameen]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] gathered active Azzameen transport vessels to raid a [[Viraxo Industries]] [[Industrial complex|Industrial Complex]], [[VXO-33274]], of its plentiful supplies. SecForce sent three of their fighters to assist the [[Otana/Legends|Otana]] in defending the transport ships from Viraxo and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] security forces. The raid was a success, and the Rebels got their supplies.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
